title: Update Simulation._handle_tx_start and start_transmission to use hop_schedule/SFN for channel
description: Modify _handle_tx_start_delayed and related methods in simulation.py to populate/use node's hop_schedule for synchronized channel selection based on SFN/EUI instead of fixed current_channel for CCP-12. Integrate with existing synchronized hopping comment. Ensure tx uses correct channel. No dead code.
